name: Signals and Threads
snippet:
In this week's episode, the season 1 finale, Ron speaks with Jeanne, Matt, and Grace, three former tech interns at Jane Street who have returned as full-timers.
A technology podcast, from Jane Street. Get a peek at how Jane Street approaches technology, and how those ideas relate to the tech landscape more broadly.
